title: Ghost Meadow Swarm State
description: Schema for swarm_state.json v1.1 — telemetry export from GhostSwarmState struct (ghost_meadow.h). Consumed by Layer B policy and external monitoring.

node_id.description: Unique identifier for this node in the swarm (gm_u8).

epoch_id.description: Current epoch counter. Increments on each decay() call (gm_u8).

saturation_pct.description: Meadow saturation as a percentage (0.0–100.0). Ratio of set bits to total bits.

merge_source_count.description: Number of distinct merge sources seen this epoch. Used by quorum guard.

merge_delta_last.description: Bits newly set by the last merge operation. Canary: must be >= 0 (OR-monotonicity invariant).

ghost_trigger_count.description: Cumulative ghost trigger activations. Managed by Layer B, stored in Layer A.

false_neg_budget.description: False negative budget. Always 0.0 within an epoch (append-only guarantee). Layer B manages across epoch boundaries.

layer_b_zone.description: Current escalation zone set by Layer B policy. 0=nominal, 1=yellow, 2=orange, 3=red.

total_merges_lifetime.description: Total number of merge operations across all epochs for this node.
